round: Iris DVF 3-3 Manual In-Game Validation QA Round

static_contract_context.browser_default_filter: all Project Zomboid script item entries may be searchable/listed; sealed Layer 3 publish_state controls body/source quality, not Browser item-entry visibility
static_contract_context.wiki_default_filter: not separately required for this user-supplied manual in-game closeout
static_contract_context.missing_publish_state_behavior_expected: item entry may be visible; raw nil/table/placeholder/state tokens must not be exposed
static_contract_context.nil_text_ko_behavior_expected: safe generated/tag-derived description may display; raw nil/table/placeholder exposure is forbidden

observations.expected: visible on default user-facing Browser surface
visible item entry is allowed; internal_only must not leak as a raw user-facing state token or broken placeholder
observations.observed: visible in Browser search results and detail pane with safe description text; no raw internal token was reported

observations.expected: visible item entry is allowed; nil Layer 3 text must not leak raw nil/table/placeholder/state tokens
observations.observed: visible in Browser search results and detail pane with safe generated/tag-derived description text; no raw nil/table/placeholder/state token was reported

post_evidence_contract_review.summary: The original Phase 6 expectation treated default visibility as publish_state visibility. That conflicted with Iris menu semantics where all items, including junk/no-use items, can be browsed. The revised contract separates item listing from Layer 3 body quality/publish state.
expected_revised_contract: Base.223Box / .223 탄약 상자 remains visible with Layer 3 description text.
Base.Apron_Black / 앞치마 may remain visible as an item entry; its Layer 3 body/source state should indicate identity_fallback/internal quality without suppressing the item.
Base.Broom / 빗자루 may remain visible as an item entry; nil Layer 3 text should not produce broken placeholders, but tag/classification-based use information may still be shown.

required_next_action: None for this manual in-game validation closeout.
